commit_scope: Add wellness edge-category cluster sensing for concepts, ideas, specs, and files

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/concept-corpus.fk form-stdlib/edge-categories.fk form-stdlib/tests/edge-categories-band.fk
local_validation.summary: Form now carries edge category, cluster, reflex-pain, and sampled real concept edge sensing. Wellness reports full source edge categories through a Python bridge, but names that bridge as hot self-inflicted pain while recording that concept_contains_concept sampled sensing has been released into Form through concept-corpus.fk.

known_failed_attempts.output: Initial Form file used BML-style `def`; sibling kernels reported unbound function `def`. The file now uses raw Form `defn` and validates across Go/Rust/TypeScript.

ci_validation.reason: No commit or PR created in this turn.

deploy_validation.reason: Local sensing and tests only; no runtime deployment was performed.

phase_gate.reason: Local validation passed, but no CI or deployment validation ran in this turn.

evidence_refs: Focused test proves malformed idea spec links, spec source files, concept body references, and named clusters.

Form band returns 65535 across Go/Rust/TypeScript, proving category, cluster, hot not-surprised Python-for-Form reflex-pain, and sampled real concept_contains_concept sensing through concept-corpus.fk.
Real wellness run reported 2301 edge events across 7 named category surfaces.

Wellness names the Python source scanner as bridge-only with self_inflicted_pain=hot and release_target=form-substrate-cell, while marking released_slice=concept_contains_concept/sample-via-concept-corpus.
